description: bizneo solutions s.l., dba bizneo hr, is a spanish company specialized in human resources software solutions, including cloud-based hr management platforms and recruitment technology. the company develops and provides a suite of hr software modules, such as talent management, core hr, time management, recruiting, performance management, training management, and employee surveys, serving clients in spain and internationally across more than 40 countries. bizneo hr also offers a mobile application for remote workers and supports multiple languages and recruitment sources.

hr sincron srl, dba sincron hr, is a romanian software company specialized in providing hr software solutions, including recruitment, talent management, and hr analytics. the company offers a comprehensive platform that covers areas such as recruitment, onboarding, staffing, time and attendance, payroll, performance management, training management, employee self-service, internal communication, and hr analytics. sincron hr serves clients across europe and north america, supporting businesses of various sizes in streamlining hr processes and operational efficiency.
core_offerings: Time and Attendance Management Software Development

description: bcs b.v., dba bcs hr software, is a dutch company that develops and provides hr management and payroll administration software. the company offers a modular suite of hrm and payroll solutions, including modules for recruitment, leave management, expense management, hr analytics, workflows, onboarding, offboarding, time tracking, and benefits administration. bcs hr software also provides payroll outsourcing, hr analytics, and hr workflows, as well as implementation services, training programs, and it consulting. the company serves organizations of various sizes across multiple industries and is certified for data protection and privacy.
core_offerings: HR Onboarding and Offboarding Solutions Development
Learning and Development Management Solutions Development
HR Software Implementation and Consulting Services
Leave and Absenteeism Tracking Software Development

description: grouper technology limited, known as bamboohr, is an irish software company engaged in providing hr management software solutions. the company offers a comprehensive platform for hr management, including payroll, hiring, benefits, employee management, employee experience, and performance management, serving startups, small, mid-sized, and large companies across more than 150 countries. bamboohr also operates as a provider of applicant tracking systems, electronic signatures, and a mobile app for onboarding and offboarding, and is soc ii certified.

dgnet ltd, known as pandapé, is a british software company engaged in human resources software solutions, including recruitment and selection, hr management, employee onboarding, payroll management, employee engagement, performance evaluation, and hr analytics. the company serves clients across latin america and europe, providing software that integrates with hr platforms and offers features such as multiposting, candidate databases, psychometric tests, and ai-driven recruitment solutions. pandapé operates in multiple countries and offers its software in spanish, portuguese, and english.

kapsoon, sas, dba kapsoon, is a french company specialized in digital human resources software solutions for insurance agents and brokers. the company provides a saas-based hr management platform that integrates with crm systems to support hr processes, performance management, onboarding, offboarding, document management, employee training, performance evaluation, and payroll automation. kapsoon serves agencies and users across france.

ciphr limited is a british private company that develops and provides hr software and payroll solutions, including cloud-based hr and payroll platforms, employee benefits management, recruitment and onboarding software, and learning management systems. the company also offers hr managed services, outsourced payroll, hr software training, diversity and inclusion consultancy, hr software implementation, and hr analytics. ciphr serves clients across sectors such as care homes, charities, financial firms, law firms, manufacturing, media and communications, professional services, and schools. the company is iso certified and operates a dedicated team for software development and integration.

asys is a french software publisher specialized in human resources (hr) management software. the company provides a suite of hr management solutions, including time management, planning, talent management, and recruitment, designed to support clients in sectors such as healthcare, industry, retail, agriculture, and leisure. asys also offers training and support services related to its software, and emphasizes regulatory compliance and performance in its offerings.

personio is a german information technology company specialized in employee management solutions, including applicant tracking systems, human resources software, recruitment tools, performance management, time-off management, payroll, and employee self-service. the company serves enterprises and small to medium-sized organizations, focusing on hr technology and software development, and operates primarily in the cloud and saas market.

quarksup is a french software company that develops and provides human resources management software as a service. the company offers a platform for centralized and automated hr processes, including recruitment, employee onboarding, mobility, training, payroll management, and e-learning. quarksup serves organizations of various sizes and sectors, such as private companies, public organizations, and educational institutions, and is part of the visma group.
core_offerings: Training and E-Learning Management Software Development

description: novative sa is a swiss private company that provides human resources and payroll outsourcing services, as well as hr management software solutions. the company offers cloud-based hr and payroll platforms, including hrms, payroll software, and workforce management tools such as absence management, time and attendance, and workforce scheduling. novative also delivers hr analytics, performance management, talent management, and finance services. its operations serve multinational corporations, banks, industries, services, distribution, hotels, and ngos in europe, the usa, and the middle east. the company is iso certified and holds additional certifications for security and compliance.
core_offerings: Absence and Time Attendance Management Solutions

description: novrh is a french company specialized in the development and integration of sirh (système d'information des ressources humaines) and payroll software solutions for medium-sized enterprises in france. the company provides a modular, web-based hr and payroll management platform, including modules for payroll, personnel administration, absence management, benefits and remuneration, talent management, recruitment, training, and hr decision-making tools. novrh serves private and public companies across sectors such as healthcare, social services, and medical-social fields, and operates a software-as-a-service (saas) model with secure data hosting in france. the company also offers hosting, implementation, training, maintenance, and hotline support.
core_offerings: HR and Payroll Software Training Services

description: ascia is a portuguese company that provides information technology solutions for human resource management, including software for payroll processing, attendance management, employee benefits, recruitment, performance evaluation, and training. the company also offers human resource consulting services and develops enterprise systems to support hr departments in managing talent and legal obligations. ascia serves organizations in the human resources sector.

global hr is a british software company that develops and delivers human resources management (hrm) software solutions, including modules for employee management, performance evaluation, and corporate learning management. the company provides a cloud-based platform that integrates hr processes such as recruitment, onboarding, and talent management, and supports organizations of various sizes, including small businesses and multinational corporations. global hr also offers customization options for its software to accommodate specific organizational requirements.
core_offerings: HR Software Scalability and Adaptability Services
HR Policy and Document Management Solutions

description: toba hr solutions nv, dba toba hr solutions, is a belgian company specialized in hr software solutions, focusing on workforce management, employee engagement, and talent development. the company provides a suite of tools for staff scheduling, time tracking, performance management, talent development, and hr administration, serving clients in multiple languages and across various business sizes. in addition to its core software offerings, toba hr solutions operates an academy that delivers training programs to enhance user skills.
core_offerings: Web and Mobile HR Software Access

description: everyday software, s.l., dba factorial, is a spanish company specialized in hr software solutions, focusing on administrative streamlining, employee management, and operational efficiency. the company provides a platform that integrates time management, talent management, payroll, and financial management, as well as features for employee performance tracking, onboarding and offboarding, training management, and employee engagement surveys. factorial serves a global client base across more than 120 countries, with a presence in sectors such as manufacturing, consulting, technology, healthcare, and telework. the company is iso certified for data security and privacy.

visma youserve is a dutch company that provides payroll and human resources software and services, with a focus on hr management and payroll administration. the company offers hr software solutions, hr outsourcing, interim hr and payroll services, hr robotics and ai, and digital onboarding. it also delivers training, webinars, and events related to hr and payroll, and integrates its services with external partners for performance management, flex benefits, and recruitment. visma youserve is iso certified and holds the data pro certificate.

hr campus ag is a swiss private company that provides human resources consulting, software solutions, and related services. the company offers hr consulting, software implementation, and hr outsourcing, as well as interim management and change management services. its offerings include hr administration, payroll, travel and expenses management, time and document management, pension fund management, talent management, hr analytics, and external workforce management. hr campus serves clients in switzerland and the romandie region, including smes, large enterprises, and public sector organizations.
core_offerings: HR Outsourcing and Interim Management Services

description: sesame labs, s.l., dba sesame hr, is a spanish company specialized in human resources software solutions. the company provides a range of hr management tools, including time management, recruitment, employee onboarding, performance evaluation, talent management, organizational climate assessment, and internal communication. sesame hr serves a global market, with users in more than 30 countries across the americas, europe, and asia. the company also offers ai-driven solutions and people analytics as part of its offerings.
core_offerings: Web and Mobile HR Software Deployment

description: virtualia is a french software company specialized in human resources management solutions for the public sector. the company provides a comprehensive hr management system that includes personnel administration, payroll processing, workforce management, salary management, employment management, professional training, career management, and time management. virtualia also offers training services related to its hr software.

kéméo, dba kammi, is a french company specialized in human resources management software and consulting services. the company develops and provides a modular suite of hr management solutions, including administrative hr management, talent management, and payroll management, serving smes and medium-sized enterprises in over 10 countries. kammi also offers externalization services such as payroll preparation and talent management.

icon software solutions limited, dba icon hr, is a british company specialized in providing cloud-based hr software solutions for businesses. the company offers hr management systems that include features such as employee data management, performance evaluation, employee scheduling, time tracking, recruitment and applicant tracking, document management, and hr analytics and reporting. icon hr serves clients across various industries and business sizes.
core_offerings: Recruitment and Applicant Tracking Software Development
Employee Scheduling and Time Tracking Solutions

description: cantoriel sirh, dba cantoriel, is a french software company that develops and provides integrated and modular human resources information system (sirh) software, including payroll, general tax administration, and human resources management. the company offers solutions for payroll management, personnel administration, time and activity management, talent management, professional training, recruitment, and hr operations. cantoriel also provides digitalization services, software maintenance, and supports both on-premise and cloud hosting. its platform is designed to support multi-statut employees, various contracts and collective agreements, and job assignments for public and private sector organizations. the company serves a range of industries, including electrical and gas, sanitary and medical-social, epic-gip, and entertainment and leisure sectors.
core_offerings: Time and Activity Management Software Development
Payroll and HR Software Integration Services

description: moorepay limited is a british company that provides payroll and hr services, including payroll outsourcing, hr software, and hr consulting. the company also offers employee engagement, employee benefits, recruitment software, performance management, expense management, and health and safety services. moorepay is accredited by the cipp’s payroll assurance scheme and holds iso 27001 and iso 9001 certifications. its operations are supported by a technology infrastructure and a team of qualified professionals.

foederis is a swiss company specialized in the development and distribution of software solutions for talent management and human resources information systems. the company provides a saas-based hr software suite that covers transactional hr processes, training, performance, competencies, career management, recruitment, and hr consulting, serving clients primarily in switzerland and internationally. foederis also offers customer support and consulting services related to its hr software solutions.

buzz hr ltd, dba buzz hr, is a british company specialized in providing hr software solutions for small businesses in the united kingdom. the company offers a comprehensive suite of hr management tools, including digital hr records, document storage, absence tracking, team calendars, reporting and analytics, payroll data exports, employee self-service, mobile apps, recruitment ats, onboarding/offboarding, timesheets and shift scheduling, expenses tracking, performance management, and employee engagement surveys. buzz hr's software is designed to automate hr administrative tasks, streamline processes, and support scalable hr management strategies for uk businesses. the company is cyber essentials plus and iso-27001 accredited, and its software is hosted on microsoft's uk cloud platform.
core_offerings: HR Software API and Integration Services

description: workbee limited, dba crocodile, is a british private company specializing in human resources software solutions, with a focus on cloud-based hr management systems for small businesses, not-for-profits, and professional services. the company develops and provides hr software that includes employee data management, payroll processing, performance management, time and attendance tracking, and employee self-service, all integrated with cloud storage and mobile applications. crocodile serves clients in sectors such as renewable energy, professional services, estate and letting agents, veterinary practices, dental practices, and transportation and haulage, and offers its software in multiple languages and supports various integrations.

sesame labs, s.l., dba sesame hr, is a spanish software company and human resource consulting firm specialized in providing human resources software solutions. the company offers a range of functionalities including employee management, document management, hr reporting, electronic signature, internal communication, talent and culture management, recruitment, performance evaluation, training management, time management, vacation and absence management, task management, shift management, and financial management. sesame hr serves a global clientele across sectors such as retail, technology, industry, transport and logistics, and hospitality, with a presence in more than 30 countries. the company is iso certified for quality management and information security management.
core_offerings: Talent and Culture Management Software Development
Time and Attendance Management Software Development

description: sesame labs, s.l., dba sesame hr, is a spanish company specialized in human resources software solutions. the company provides a range of hr management tools, including time control, recruitment, scheduling, employee onboarding, performance evaluation, organizational climate surveys, talent and culture management, internal communication, and remote work management. sesame hr serves clients in over 30 countries, including brazil, mexico, the usa, and europe, and offers its software in multiple languages. the company also incorporates technologies such as ai and machine learning into its hr solutions.
core_offerings: Talent and Culture Management Software Development

description: paychex europe germany gmbh, dba paychex, is a german private company specialized in payroll accounting and human resources management solutions. the company provides cloud-based payroll software and digital hr office solutions, serving a diverse clientele that includes businesses of various sizes, public sector entities, tax consultancies, and financial accounting firms. paychex also offers hr management software for recruitment, onboarding, personnel administration, and training management, and has expanded its operations through acquisitions in the human resources and payroll sectors.
core_offerings: Payroll and HR Data Integration Solutions
Customized HR and Payroll Solutions Development

description: sun rh is a french software company engaged in providing human resources (hr) management solutions for businesses of all sizes and sectors, including industrial, commercial, healthcare, and educational organizations. the company offers a comprehensive hr software platform that integrates recruitment management, payroll processing, leave and absence tracking, training management, and talent management, as well as electronic contract signing, automated data processing, and real-time hr reporting. sun rh serves both smes and large enterprises, with features tailored for large organizations and integration with other internal systems. the company also provides ongoing support and training to its clients.
core_offerings: HR Software Customization and Integration Services
Real-Time HR Reporting and Analytics Solutions
Leave and Absence Tracking Software Solutions

description: hrappka is a polish company specialized in hr management software, serving clients in the hr and payroll sectors, including government entities. the company provides a cloud-based hr management system with modules for recruitment, legalization of foreign workers, employee onboarding, electronic time recording, and electronic leave requests, as well as a calendar service for hr and payroll dates. hrappka also offers training and support to its clients.
core_offerings: HR and Payroll Calendar Software Development
Legalization of Foreign Workers Software Development

description: educosvision services, s.a.r.l. is a luxembourgish private company that develops and provides human resources information systems (hris) and payroll solutions. the company offers a cloud-based platform for hr administration, payroll processing, workforce planning, employee and manager self-service, training administration, and talent management. educos serves organizations in sectors such as financial services, banking, insurance, communication, media, and the public sector, and facilitates integration with government bodies and third-party service providers.

staff & go is a french company engaged in agile human resources software solutions, focusing on payroll and personnel management. the company provides a modular hr platform that integrates with payroll software, offering modules for recruitment, leave and absence management, time management, payroll variables, professional interviews, internal communication, expense notes, and electronic signature. staff & go serves a diverse clientele, including accounting firms, companies, and integrators, and operates globally, with a particular focus on businesses in the hr and payroll sectors.
core_offerings: Leave and Absence Management Software Development

description: trakstar is a dutch company specialized in human resources management software and performance management solutions. the company provides a suite of hr management tools, including performance evaluation, employee development, recruitment, and employee engagement solutions, as well as management consulting and business consulting services. trakstar serves hr departments, recruitment agencies, and businesses seeking to improve employee engagement and performance, primarily in the netherlands and internationally.

iguanahr is a british hr management software platform specialized in providing a comprehensive solution for hr processes, including onboarding, performance tracking, staff holiday management, employee data management, payroll processing, recruitment, benefits administration, and performance appraisals. the platform is designed to support businesses in managing hr operations and is accessible via a mobile app, integrating with other systems and allowing users to apply their own branding. iguanahr is available for subscription pricing and is used by businesses, independent accountants, and hr consultants.

tenea tecnologías s.l., dba tenea talent, is a spanish company specialized in human resources software solutions. the company provides a modular suite of modules for hr management, including functionalities such as expense management, payroll, vacation and absence management, onboarding, employee portals, task management, document management, project management, telework management, turn management, and a whistleblowing channel. tenea talent serves companies, employees, and managers, and is iso certified.
core_offerings: Vacation and Absence Management Software Development

description: uman xpert is a portuguese software company specialized in human resources management (hrm) solutions, offering a comprehensive, fully automated platform that integrates recruitment, onboarding, performance management, payroll, training, and employee well-being. the company also provides human resource consulting services and serves clients across various industries, including small and medium-sized enterprises.

lucca software iberia, s.l., dba lucca, is a spanish software company specialized in modular human resources software solutions. the company provides a platform with multiple hr modules, including core hr, time and attendance, office management, talent and performance management, climate surveys, training management, remuneration tracking, and financial management. lucca serves businesses and organizations worldwide, with a presence in over 130 countries. the company is iso certified for data protection and compliance with international standards.

sesame labs, s.l., dba sesame hr, is a spanish company specialized in providing human resources software solutions. the company offers a suite of hr management tools, including time tracking, absence and shift management, payroll management, and employee engagement platforms, serving businesses globally with a presence in the usa, germany, spain, france, the uk, italy, the netherlands, portugal, and brazil.

inpact is a french company specialized in payroll and human resources software solutions, operating as a publisher and integrator of hr and payroll management systems. the company provides software for payroll and hr management, including automation of payroll processes, integration with existing hr and payroll systems, and features such as hr indicators, cost tracking, and electronic contract management. inpact also offers consulting, advisory services, shared outsourcing, and specialized development in areas including payroll, social management, human resources, accounting, taxation, and auditing. the company serves small and medium-sized enterprises and large organizations across france.
core_offerings: Payroll and HR Software Consulting Services
Payroll and HR System Automation Solutions
Payroll and HR Software Training Services
Payroll and HR Software Post-Integration Support Services
Payroll and HR Software Customization Services
Payroll and HR Software Pre-Project Audit Services
Payroll and HR Software Shared Outsourcing
Payroll and HR Software Support Services

description: platfohrm centhro bv, dba platfohrm, is a belgian company that provides human resources consulting, hr software solutions, and training services for small and medium-sized enterprises. the company offers a digital hr platform that automates personnel management, hr certification training, and payroll services. platfohrm also supports talent management and digital hr processes for its clients.

zellis uk limited is a british company that develops and provides ai-enabled hr, workforce management, and payroll software and services. the company offers managed payroll, hr services, and advisory services, and operates a platform that integrates hr, payroll, and workforce management functions. zellis serves employers in sectors such as financial services, manufacturing, public sector, and retail, and is b corp-certified. the company also develops payroll and hr software solutions and supports its operations with a team of experts in the uk, ireland, and india.

jooma is a french company specialized in digital hr and payroll management services, offering saas solutions for startups, small and medium enterprises, and organizations with less than 100 employees. the company provides payroll automation, hr management, expense notes, talent management, onboarding/offboarding, professional meetings, and digital hr security services, including digital vaults and electronic hr signatures. jooma also offers training through its jooma academy and is a partner of silae, a saas payroll and hr management software provider.
core_offerings: Digital HR and Payroll Management Solutions
Digital Vault and Electronic Signature Services

description: team2go talent management solutions, s.l., dba team2go, is a spanish company specialized in providing hr software solutions for businesses across sectors such as technology, industry, health, and automotive. the company offers a suite of hr management tools, including an employee portal, organizational structure management, recruitment and selection, talent management, training management, compensation and benefits, and a complaints channel. team2go is iso certified and supports its digital marketing activities with funding from the andalusian innovation and development agency (idea). its solutions are designed to be adaptable to various business management models and integrate with erp systems, payroll software, and business intelligence tools.

hrware consulting gmbh & co. kg is a german company that provides software solutions and consulting services for human resources management. the company offers hr software implementation, consulting, support, and development, as well as specialized training and seminars related to hr management systems. its services also include payroll processing, accounting, recruitment management, time management, digital personnel files, and employee portal management. hrware consulting serves clients in germany and switzerland.
core_offerings: HR Project Analysis and Implementation Services

description: uk hr cloud is a british company specialized in hr management system (hrms) software solutions, with a focus on compliance, legal requirements, and employee engagement. the company provides services such as employee information management, payroll management, time and attendance tracking, recruitment and onboarding, hr file preparation, sponsor licence application, sponsor licence compliance, and hr analytics. uk hr cloud also offers consultancy, training, and support to help organizations optimize their hr processes. it serves uk-based organizations and businesses.
core_offerings: Time and Attendance Tracking Software Development

description: safebridge s.l., dba safebridge, is a spanish technological consulting firm specialized in human resources management, with a focus on cloud-based hr solutions. the company provides certified consultants and technicians to support payroll, personnel administration, talent management, and time management processes for clients in spain. safebridge also offers implementation, training, and ongoing support services, and collaborates with partners and technology manufacturers in the hr software sector.

address.town: The Municipal District of Laytown — Bettystown

description: thesaurus software ltd, dba brightpay, is an irish software company specialized in payroll and hr software solutions. the company serves employers across ireland, the uk, and india, providing cloud-based payroll and hr software for small and medium-sized enterprises, accountants, and bookkeepers. brightpay also offers additional products such as expense management, contract management, and enterprise payroll solutions.

microtis s.a., dba microtis, is a luxembourgish software company specialized in the design and implementation of human resources management software solutions. the company provides a suite of hr software products, including modules for employee management, recruitment, training, performance management, salary calculation, and time management, as well as a web-based collaborative solution for employee profile management. microtis serves organizations across sectors such as industry, aeronautics, transport, service, and finance, with a focus on companies with more than 50 employees. in addition to software development, the company offers support services such as on-site installation, training, and maintenance contracts, and provides regular training courses and a 24/7 helpdesk.
core_offerings: Timesheet and Time Management Software Development
HR Management Software Design and Development
